/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sigtool.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/sigtool.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sigtool.dir/SigConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sigtool.dir/SigKeyManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sigtool.dir/ECDSAEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sigtool.dir/RSAPSSEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sigtool.dir/NegativeTests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sigtool.dir/BatchVerifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sigtool.dir/SigBenchmarker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sigtool.dir/SigKAT.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sigtool.dir/ManualRSAPSS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sigtool.dir/ModularArithmetic.cpp.o -o sigtool  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /home/kali/Desktop/REPORT_5_LAB/cryptopp/lib/linux/libcryptopp.a -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
